queries.question: What press conferences were attended by politicians and what interviews did they also attend?
queries.sql:
SELECT News_Article.Title 
FROM Information_Gathering_Method JOIN News_Article ON Information_Gathering_Method.id = News_Article.information_gathering_method_id JOIN Participant_Type ON News_Article.participant_type_id = Participant_Type.id
WHERE (Information_Gathering_Method.method = "Press Conference" OR Information_Gathering_Method.method = "Interview") AND Participant_Type.type = "Politician"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?information_gathering_method a :Information_Gathering_Method .
  ?news_article a :Articles .
  ?news_article p:hasInformation_Gathering_Method ?information_gathering_method .
  ?participant_type a :Participant_Type .
  ?news_article p:hasParticipant_Type ?participant_type .
  ?news_article p:title ?title .
  ?information_gathering_method p:method ?method_w .
  ?information_gathering_method p:method ?method_w2 .
  ?participant_type p:type ?type_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?method_w) = "Press Conference" || STR(?method_w2) = "Interview")) && STR(?type_w) = "Politician"))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show press conferences and interviews attended by politicians.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE attachment {
  high: { SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?information_gathering_method a :Information_Gathering_Method .
  ?news_article a :Articles .
  ?news_article p:hasInformation_Gathering_Method ?information_gathering_method .
  ?participant_type a :Participant_Type .
  ?news_article p:hasParticipant_Type ?participant_type .
  ?news_article p:title ?title .
  ?information_gathering_method p:method ?method_w .
  ?information_gathering_method p:method ?method_w2 .
  ?participant_type p:type ?type_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?method_w) = "Press Conference" || STR(?method_w2) = "Interview")) && STR(?type_w) = "Politician"))
} }
  low: { SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?information_gathering_method a :Information_Gathering_Method .
  ?news_article a :Articles .
  ?news_article p:hasInformation_Gathering_Method ?information_gathering_method .
  ?participant_type a :Participant_Type .
  ?news_article p:hasParticipant_Type ?participant_type .
  ?news_article p:title ?title .
  ?information_gathering_method p:method ?method_w .
  ?information_gathering_method p:method ?method_w2 .
  ?participant_type p:type ?type_w .
  FILTER((STR(?method_w) = "Press Conference" || (STR(?method_w2) = "Interview" && STR(?type_w) = "Politician")))
} }
}
